description: Why Choose the OneTigris CONIFER T/C Chimney Tent? Named after the strength and resilience of the evergreens that have allowed them to survive in a wide range of ecosystems for many years, the CONIFER T/C Tent is a beautiful tent of great functionality for campers and bushcrafters to explore with. It can sleep up to 2 or comfortably for 1 camper with a raised camp cot at the back, with a wider A-frame and not the traditional central pole to maximize space and comfort. Airflow is guaranteed with its skillfully tailored triangular vents for taking in the summer night breeze, and T/C fabric ensures protection against UV light and overheating during the day. When the winter months arrive, utilize the pre-cut chimney opening with stove jack and snow skirts for hot tent camping, and know that you’ll stay cozy and comfortable in freezing temperatures. About terylene cotton: The T/C fabric is known for its rugged quality that’s thicker, heavier and more durable than the usual outdoor gear fabric commonly used. It’s also fire-retardant (safer to use next to campfires), efficiently blocks out sunlight and heat, and its unique material technology enables it to be more water-resistant with each use through the fabric’s interaction with moisture in the outdoors. Fabric performance can be enhanced by setting it up next to a river, stream, or even drizzle. While it looks similar to the SCAENA and COSMITTO backpacking tents, STELLA is a 4-season, 3000mm waterproof rated, carbon black camping shelter, with a mesh inner layer for good airflow, and a breathable solid outer layer for adequate heat retention. Designed with the most straightforward setup method via flexible poles that cross at the top of the dome and are securely anchored to the floor on all 4 corners, you have a quick and easy outdoor setup for use to protect you against the elements. Going backpacking? STELLA can come with! description: Why Choose OneTigris ROC SHIELD Bushcraft Tent? OneTigris is inviting you to enjoy the winter camping with this bushcraft mind piece of gear. Introducing the T/C version ROC SHIELD, not only the new fabric but the upgrade in design. ( Using T/C(Polyester 65% Cotton 35%) means the tent is highly durable and fire-retardant, comparing to Nylon fabric, which currently is a hit in Asia. ) You may encounter with it in the summer. Now we extended it to the winters by adding the stove jacket to make it a hot tent. Inspired by classic WWII style shelters built with tarps, it can be planted on the ground or raised in the air, functioning as a superior sun and rain cover while offering versatility and bigger space for heightened comfort. It is highly adaptable to different terrains and can be configured based on your preference and outdoor aptitude. OneTigris ROC SHIELD Bushcraft Tent T/C fabric construction that’s highly durable and fire-retardant. Bushcraft minds: multiple setups. Ideal for winter camping with the opening for stove jacket that fits most tent stoves. description: Why Choose OneTigris SOLO HOMESTEAD CAMPING TENT? Akin to the OUTBACK RETREAT, this rugged shelter is built for one person, with the same distinctive twin-peaked roof, and the same porch mojo for you to use with a camping chair to soak in the wild. Its unique structure enables heightened wind-resistance and stability in setup, and the T/C version has a stove jack opening for stove pipes, as well as a detachable tent bottom. The SOLO HOMESTEAD is perfect for road trips and motorbike trips, and it’s a real treat to look at and to call it your home away from home. About terylene cotton: The T/C fabric is known for its rugged quality that’s thicker, heavier and more durable than the usual outdoor gear fabric commonly used. It’s also fire-retardant and safer to use next to campfires, efficiently blocks out sunlight and heat, and its unique material technology enables it to be more water-resistant with each use through the fabric’s interaction with moisture in the outdoors. Fabric performance can be enhanced by setting it up next to a river, stream, or even drizzle. description: Why Choose OneTigris TEGIMEN Hammock Awning & Hot Tent? A product completely shields a hammock or hot tent camper from the wind and rain, also enabling tent stoves to be used when winter camping. Some may ask, why hammock camping in the winter? Because melting snow means cold and wet gear/attire, and a hammock will keep you nice and dry above the ground. “Tegimen” means protection, covering and body armor in Latin, and this shelter awning is exactly that. It’s a cost-efficient, lightweight and compact solution for bushcrafters and outdoor loving folks that has a sod skirt to prevent winter chills from seeping in through the bottom gaps, and burning stove compatibility with heat retention functionality for you to stay warm with a burning stove. description: Why Choose OneTigris TIGER ROAR Tent Stove? Third in line of our ROC camping stoves, this one is the mightiest of them all. With a stove body forged from #304 stainless steel, it’s an ideal piece of kit for outdoorsmen owning a car during winter camping trips and outdoor cooking missions. This tent wood stove can keep your tent toasty, body warm, your clothes dry, and your meals hot all winter. This stove system comes with a stove pipe, elbow pipes, a pair of quality leather gloves and a piece of replacement glass. All parts can be stored inside the stove body. OneTigris TIGER ROAR Camping Stove System ● Stove body material: #304 stainless steel; chimney/elbow pipe material #201 stainless steel ● Measures at 17.3” by 8.5” by 10.6”, with a pipe height of 6.8ft/2.1m ● Product weight of 21.2lb (9.6kg) with a chamber size of 878 cubic inch ● Comes with chimney pipe, elbow pipes, one pair of leather gloves and one replacement glass ● Ideal for outdoorsmen with a car for cooking and wood burning purposes Note Gloves should to be worn when assembling/disassembling/using the stove to avoid cut/burn injuries. Laser-cut machine marks/welding marks/scratches may be visible in product appearancebut functionality will not be affected. Stainless steel material will change in shape and color after use but functionality will not be affected. Never leave your tent while the wood stove is in use. Always use CO detectors and maintain good ventilation while burning wood stoves inside your tent.

description: Why Choose OneTigris TOWER M Camping Tent? Inspired by the drum towers in old Asian cities, the TOWER M is an extra large camping shelter that fits a family and some more. The tent height is 6.2ft (190cm) and the interior space measures 13.1 sq. ft. Campers can comfortably fit multiple camping cots or sleeping bags, some camping furniture, and still have space left for storing luggage and gear. Using 40D nylon that is durable and highly dirt/water/abrasion resistant, with a layer of PU coating for 3000mm waterproofing and UPF50+ sun protection, it’s great for keeping campers protected from the elements. The TOWER M opens on 4 sides with domed entrances, offering a great view and good airflow. Thanks to its special dome-shaped design and 8-piece aluminum tent frame, the TOWER M is highly wind-resistant and gorgeous to look at. Equipped with a stove pipe opening for winter camping, use of premium fabric, and excellent heat retention, campers can camp out in the snow, staying cozy and warm without worrying about snow buildup. In short, the TOWER M is a great option for outdoor lovers everywhere for all seasons. description: Why Choose OneTigris WILD ROCKET Bushcraft Pack? What’s essential to survival in the wild? Your outdoor aptitude and the gear on your back. The WILD ROCKET 45L Pack is designed with bushcrafters in mind, featuring US licensed Cordura® nylon for rugged usability, with a 36L capacity main compartment and side/front compartments to carry up to 2 days’ necessities. It’s a straightforward piece of kit for loading up outdoor gear, with tactical durability and versatility in mind. The roll top design allows quick access to your gear, several rows of webbing enable modular attachment of MOLLE add-ons, and on both sides you’ll find a specially designated axe storage space. At the bottom of the pack are straps for rolled up mats or quilts, so that you can utilize all possible space with efficiency. The shoulder straps feature adjustable straps to customize the fit so that the pack hugs the torso and carries weight in the most efficient way. Ideal for 31.5”-47” waist sizes.
